_comment: Anthropic Messages API response shape — the SAME pedagogical scenario as golden_response_openai.json (model picks math.add(2,3)) but in the native Anthropic block-union format. content is a flat array of typed blocks ({text|tool_use}); input is a real JSON object (not a stringified one); stop_reason is 'tool_use'. Side-by-side with the OpenAI version, this is the wire-format diff our OpenAIProvider exists to bridge.

content.text: I'll use the math tool to compute 2 + 3.
